prompt: Transform the character in the first reference image [Your image] into a stylized 3D character poster. Keep the exact outfit, hair color, accessories, and traits from the reference — do not redesign the wardrobe. Character: oversized head, small body, chest-up
promptEn: Transform the character in the first reference image [Your image] into a stylized 3D character poster. Keep the exact outfit, hair color, accessories, and traits from the reference — do not redesign the wardrobe. Character: oversized head, small body, chest-up
